name: more-by-kv
description: Centralized "More by kv" cross-promo registry (works.json) + React glass card list component

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.jsx --bundle --external:react --format=esm --outdir=dist --out-extension:.js=.js --banner:js="'use client';" && esbuild src/index.jsx --bundle --external:react --format=cjs --outdir=dist --out-extension:.js=.cjs --banner:js="'use client';" && cp src/styles.css src/index.d.ts src/works.json dist/

author: kv
